description: Style Noteremanika combines edgy style, figure flattering cuts and lean fits in each and every one of its creations. Wear this purple dress with strappy sandals and accessorise subtly for an understated elegant look, or with chunky jewellery for a loud fashionable look.Product Details Purple off shoulder sleeveless dress with tiered ruffles around the entire neckline  Material and CareViscose Gentle machine wash Do not bleach and flat dry Use cold iron  Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M which measures 79 cm from shoulder to hem
